recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: Sites.ReadWrite.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para listar e operar itens em sites SharePoint e pastas de arquivos ligadas aos canais do Teams.

recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: Files.ReadWrite.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para operacoes de arquivos, exportacao de metadados e leitura de bibliotecas.

recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: Channel.ReadBasic.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para listar canais de um time no Microsoft Teams.

recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: ChannelMessage.Read.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para ler mensagens do canal e compor exportacoes de conteudo.

recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: ChannelMember.ReadWrite.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para incluir e remover membros de canais do Teams.

recommendedApplicationPermissions.name: GroupMember.ReadWrite.All
recommendedApplicationPermissions.reason: Necessaria para incluir e remover membros de grupos Entra ID.

optionalApplicationPermissions.name: Group.Read.All
optionalApplicationPermissions.reason: Use apenas se o backend precisar consultar grupos antes das operacoes de associacao.

optionalApplicationPermissions.name: User.Read.All
optionalApplicationPermissions.reason: Use apenas se o backend precisar resolver usuarios por UPN ou email antes de agir.

leastPrivilegeGuidance: Se a API nao precisa alterar arquivos, prefira Sites.Read.All e Files.Read.All.
Se a API nao precisa alterar membros de canais, remova ChannelMember.ReadWrite.All.
Se a API nao precisa alterar grupos, remova GroupMember.ReadWrite.All.
Mantenha consentimento administrativo restrito a administradores do tenant.
